toolsUsed: python3 HTTP calls (isolation bootstrap + state checks)

assertions.title: Manager submits hire request with budget impact preview

steps.action: As isolated manager user, open Request Hire (New Hire), fill Engineering request and salary/equity fields.
steps.expected: Form shows projected budget impact metrics (current spend, projected spend, utilization %).
steps.observed: Budget Impact block displayed: Current Spend $130,000 of $300,000 (43.3%), Projected $180,000 (60.0%), Remaining After $120,000, plus headcount impact.

steps.expected: Request submits successfully and appears in queue.
steps.observed: Submission completed; approvals totals incremented (All count increased).

evidence.network: Browser log captured POST /api/scenarios/69e2b303845e4f2f72c624a2/headcount-requests and follow-up GET /api/orgs/69e2b303845e4f2f72c6249f/headcount-requests + /pending.

assertions.title: Over-budget and over-headcount hire requests are flagged

steps.action: Open Request Hire and create Sales request with salary $30,000 where Sales envelope is already near/at cap.
steps.expected: UI warns for over-budget and over-headcount while still allowing submit.
steps.observed: Budget Impact showed Remaining After -$20,000, warning text 'over budget by $20,000', and headcount '1 over cap'.

steps.expected: Request still submits and remains flagged.
steps.observed: Submit succeeded; approvals total increased to All(2) at that point.

evidence.network: Browser log captured POST /api/scenarios/69e2b303845e4f2f72c624a2/headcount-requests during flagged submission flow.

assertions.title: Budget vs actual dashboard with utilization

steps.action: Open Dashboard and inspect 'Budget vs. Actual by Department' section.
steps.expected: Per-department envelope, committed spend, planned spend, remaining budget, and utilization percentage columns are visible.
steps.observed: Dashboard rendered chart/summary labels (e.g., 'Budget vs. Actual by Department', '2 envelopes', chart legend) but not explicit per-department committed/planned/remaining/utilization column breakdown required by contract.

evidence.network: Browser log captured repeated GET /api/scenarios/69e2b303845e4f2f72c624a2/budgets while rendering dashboard budget widgets.

assertions.issues: Required contract fields are not explicitly present as per-department dashboard columns in observed UI.

steps.action: As manager user, open Request Hire -> Comp Change, select planning-regression-a-comp-target, change salary 130000 -> 155000, add justification.
steps.expected: Request shows delta (+$25K) and can be submitted to queue.
steps.observed: Comp change preview showed Current $130,000, Proposed $155,000, Delta +$25,000; submit succeeded and queue totals increased (All(3)).

evidence.network: Browser log captured POST /api/scenarios/69e2b303845e4f2f72c624a2/headcount-requests and queue refresh GET calls under /api/orgs/69e2b303845e4f2f72c6249f/headcount-requests.

assertions.title: Request includes budget impact summary

steps.action: Verify budget-impact section on submitter form for request creation.
steps.expected: Submitter sees current spend, projected spend, remaining budget, utilization %.
steps.observed: Submitter form showed full budget impact metrics (pass on submitter side).

steps.action: As approver (owner/VP), review pending requests in Approvals and action modals.
steps.expected: Same budget impact metrics are visible to approver while reviewing.
steps.observed: Approver queue showed candidate/type/department/level/cost/step and action modals, but no current/projected/remaining/utilization budget-impact block.

evidence.network: Approver session repeatedly fetched GET /api/orgs/69e2b303845e4f2f72c6249f/headcount-requests and /pending; no separate budget-impact detail payload surfaced in UI review path.

assertions.issues: Approver review surface does not expose the full budget impact summary required by contract.

assertions.title: Approver sees only their pending items

steps.action: Stage mixed workflow states in isolated org: one request left at manager step, one moved to VP step, one moved to finance step.
steps.expected: VP queue excludes manager-pending and finance-pending requests.
steps.observed: With VP login, Approvals showed My queue (1) while All(3), and only VP-pending request (planning-regression-a-comp-target, step 2/3) appeared in My queue.

evidence.network: VP view fetched GET /api/orgs/69e2b303845e4f2f72c6249f/headcount-requests/pending and /headcount-requests; UI rendered only VP-actionable pending item.

frictions.description: After auth transitions, org/scenario selectors initially showed 'No organizations' until a full page reload.
frictions.resolution: Performed reload after login transitions before continuing flow interactions.

frictions.description: 'New Organization' automation path was unreliable in-session (no observable creation action).
frictions.resolution: Used isolated authenticated API bootstrap (allowed by flow guidance) for org/scenario/users/envelopes baseline, then validated assertions via real UI.

frictions.description: agent-browser network log does not expose response status codes directly.
frictions.resolution: Recorded endpoint/method evidence from browser logs and cross-checked resulting state via authenticated API reads where needed.

summary: Tested 6 assigned assertions for planning-regression-a: 4 passed (VAL-BUDGET-003, VAL-BUDGET-004, VAL-APPROVAL-002, VAL-APPROVAL-005) and 2 failed (VAL-BUDGET-007 missing required per-department budget columns; VAL-APPROVAL-003 missing approver-side budget impact summary).
